sourceTitle: Generative AI in T&L at the University of Melbourne
evidenceSnippetOriginal: If an assessment task does not permit the use of such tools, or if they use such tools in the preparation of an assessment submission without acknowledgement, this constitutes academic misconduct under cl. 4.13 of the Student Academic Integrity Policy (MPF1310).
evidenceLocator: Section: University policies in relation to Generative AI, subsection: Are students allowed to use GenAI?
